object.name: PollOption
object.description: This object contains information about one answer option in a poll.
object.html_description: This object contains information about one answer option in a poll.
object.rst_description: This object contains information about one answer option in a poll.

annotations.description: Unique identifier of the option, persistent on option addition and deletion
annotations.html_description: Unique identifier of the option, persistent on option addition and deletion
annotations.rst_description: Unique identifier of the option, persistent on option addition and deletion
annotations.name: persistent_id

annotations.description: Special entities that appear in the option text. Currently, only custom emoji entities are allowed in poll option texts
annotations.html_description: Optional. Special entities that appear in the option text. Currently, only custom emoji entities are allowed in poll option texts
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Special entities that appear in the option *text*. Currently, only custom emoji entities are allowed in poll option texts
annotations.name: text_entities

annotations.description: Number of users who voted for this option; may be 0 if unknown
annotations.html_description: Number of users who voted for this option; may be 0 if unknown
annotations.rst_description: Number of users who voted for this option; may be 0 if unknown
annotations.name: voter_count

annotations.description: User who added the option; omitted if the option wasn't added by a user after poll creation
annotations.html_description: Optional. User who added the option; omitted if the option wasn't added by a user after poll creation
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. User who added the option; omitted if the option wasn't added by a user after poll creation
annotations.name: added_by_user

annotations.description: Chat that added the option; omitted if the option wasn't added by a chat after poll creation
annotations.html_description: Optional. Chat that added the option; omitted if the option wasn't added by a chat after poll creation
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Chat that added the option; omitted if the option wasn't added by a chat after poll creation
annotations.name: added_by_chat

annotations.description: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the option was added; omitted if the option existed in the original poll
annotations.html_description: Optional. Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the option was added; omitted if the option existed in the original poll
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the option was added; omitted if the option existed in the original poll
annotations.name: addition_date
